title: Campsite / Homesite Clean-Up: Before & After Competition
summary: SNC Shareholders – do you have a homesite or campsite? We are pleased to share a new contest just for you! title: National Fallen Firefighters Memorial Flag Status 2025
summary: May 4, 2025 – Half-Staff Alert – Entire United States President Trump will order all flags to half-staff on May 4, 2025, to honor the 70 firefighters who died in 2024. His official proclamation will be posted as soon as it is available.

title: AST Warrant Arrest: Wasilla [AK25027108]
summary: On 04/30/25, an Alaska State Trooper and a Court Service Officer assigned to Palmer Judicial Services arrested Christopher Raymond Carter, age 62 from Wasilla. Carter had an active warrant for his arrest for failure to appear for ASAP hearing on 03/19/25 on the original charges of Assault in the Fourth Degree and Interfering with a Report of a DV Crime. Carter was remanded to Mat Su Pretrial with $500 Cash Appearance bail.

title: AST Probation Violation: North Pole [AK25040401]
summary: On April 29, 2025, Alaskan State Troopers conducted a traffic stop on a vehicle travelling southbound on Dennis Rd in North Pole. When the vehicle stopped, one of the three occupants was found to be over-dosing. EMS was called to the scene, administered NARCAN, and transported the subject to Fairbanks Memorial Hospital. The driver of the vehicle, Daniel Jayne (34M) was found to be violating his probation. Daniel was arrested, transported, and remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center without further issue.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: a vehicle travelling southbound on Dennis Rd in North Pole
